title: Monday.com free account doesnt have option hosting in integration feature

posts.author: fransiska (fransiska)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,

I am signed up for monday.com free account.
And would like to integrate nodejs app into monday.com.

I am following instruction https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Wc86Mahz6yc&t=544s to create simple app in monday.com

But i realised that there’s no “hosting” option in the feature, see below screenshot.

image1149×572 41 KB

also when i tried to push code from local to monday.com, it getting this error

image710×201 5.05 KB

Just want to confirm is it because i use free account monday.com

Thank you
Fransiska

posts.author: amybronstein (Amy Bronstein)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi @fransiska, thanks for reaching out! To clarify, the reason you’re seeing the issue is because the regular free account doesn’t include the “hosting” feature. You’ll need to sign up for a developer account to access hosting and other dev tools. You can do that here: monday.com/appdeveloper. Hope this helps! Let me know if you have any other questions.
